calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jose A. Montalvo, of Law Offices of John A. Biard, Tel. 925.945.4218, for defendants Candle Fuel Company, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CANDLE FUEL COMPANY, INC., MATTHEW LIPPMAN Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted in its entirety, including sanctions as requested. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
